title: Sphaerostephanos talamauensis
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos talamauensis is a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae. It belongs to the genus Sphaerostephanos and the order Polypodiales. The species is classified as an epiphytic fern, meaning it grows on other plants for support. Sphaerostephanos talamauensis is native to Indonesia and is often found in tropical rainforests. This species is considered rare and is protected by conservation efforts due to its limited range and habitat.
